title: Buttery Light Middle-Eastern Chicken Kebabs
description: Quick and flavorful Middle-Eastern inspired chicken kebabs made with tender chicken, aromatic spices, and a rich buttery sauce. Perfect for a festive lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, cumin, coriander, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Preheat the pressure cooker to high pressure. Add 1 cup of water to the pressure cooker.
Add the kebabs to the pressure cooker and close the lid. Cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the kebabs from the pressure cooker and brush with melted butter.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
